text.title: Speech-to-Text — Core Rules
text.summary: Five testable rules: default provider by accuracy/cost, self-host break-even, input validation, chunking with overlap, mandatory fallback.

rule.statement: Default to GPT-4o Mini Transcribe for accuracy at low cost ($0.003/min); switch to AssemblyAI when diarization or structured output (summaries, chapters) is needed; pick Deepgram when custom vocabulary boost matters.
rule.rationale: GPT-4o Mini Transcribe offers the best accuracy/cost ratio for single-speaker audio. AssemblyAI's LeMUR pipeline adds post-processing (summaries, action items) without extra calls. Deepgram custom vocab cuts WER 20-40% on domain-specific terms.

rule.statement: Use faster-whisper (Large-v3 Turbo) for self-hosted production. Break-even vs API is at ≈30,000 minutes/month (≈500 hours). Below that, APIs are cheaper and have no ops burden.

rationale.source: A10G GPU cost vs OpenAI API pricing 2026

rule.rationale: Fixed GPU cost is ≈$276/mo minimum. Above 30K minutes, faster-whisper Large-v3 Turbo delivers 216× real-time on a single A10G and amortises the GPU. Below threshold, API is the rational choice.

rule.statement: Validate file format, sample rate, and size locally before calling any STT API. Return a structured error for unsupported inputs rather than letting the API fail mid-transfer.
rule.rationale: Large file uploads to APIs fail after consuming bandwidth and time. Pre-validation catches unsupported formats and oversized files locally before any network cost is incurred. WAV ≥8kHz mono is the floor; lower is garbage in.

rule.statement: Chunk audio files >25MB into ≤5-minute segments with a 5-second overlap. Words spanning chunk boundaries MUST not be lost.
rule.rationale: Without overlap, words that span a chunk boundary are split and the fragment gets dropped or mis-transcribed. A 5-second overlap ensures every word lands fully in at least one chunk; downstream dedup picks one copy.

rule.statement: Configure a fallback provider; never let a single-provider outage block a transcription pipeline. Fallback may be a second cloud OR local faster-whisper.
rule.rationale: Each major STT provider has had endpoint-specific outages while other parts of their API stayed up. Single-provider deployment causes feature-level downtime; a fallback eliminates it for minimal code overhead.
